description: Generate a reference finder chart for the variable star Algol during a predicted brightness minimum and write a brief observation plan. Set the observer location to Boston, MA (42.36° N, 71.05° W, 10m) and the time to November 15, 2024, at 03:00 UTC. The finder chart must be centered on Algol with the atmosphere disabled, and constellation lines, constellation labels, and the equatorial grid enabled. Save a screenshot of this view to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and create an observation plan file at ~/Desktop/algol_plan.txt containing the target name ('Algol'), its constellation ('Perseus'), and the observation location ('Boston').
